item.title: 巴伐利亚诺迪克首席执行官因30亿美元交易失败辞职
item.description: 巴伐利亚诺迪克公司首席执行官保罗·查普林即将卸任，这标志着这家疫苗制造商自去年股东否决收购要约以来，第二次发生重大领导层变动。【原文：Bavarian Nordic A/S’s Chief Executive officer Paul Chaplin will step down, marking the second major leadership shake-up at the vaccine maker since shareholders torpedoed a takeover bid last year.】

item.title: 美元走强，因油价上涨削弱市场对美联储降息的押注
item.description: 美元兑所有主要货币走强，因油价上涨促使掉期交易员减少对美联储今年降息的押注。【原文：The dollar strengthened versus all its major peers as rising oil prices spurred swaps traders to dial back bets on Federal Reserve interest-rate cuts this year】

item.title: 加拿大铀业公司与印度签署19亿美元铀矿协议
item.description: 加拿大铀业公司（Cameco Corp.）周一与印度签署了一项价值26亿加元（约合19亿美元）的铀供应协议，此举正值加拿大总理马克·卡尼对印度进行首次正式访问期间。【原文：Canadian firm Cameco Corp. signed a C$2.6 billion ($1.9 billion) uranium supply deal with India on Monday during Prime Minister Mark Carney’s first official visit to the country.】

item.title: 沙特阿拉伯拉斯塔努拉炼油厂遭无人机袭击后停产
item.description: 据知情人士透露，沙特阿美公司已暂停其位于沙特阿拉伯拉斯塔努拉炼油厂的运营，此前该地区遭遇无人机袭击。【原文：Saudi Aramco has halted operations at its Ras Tanura refinery in Saudi Arabia after a drone strike in the area, according to people familiar with the matter.】

item.title: 印度航空公司受重创，中东冲突导致航班中断
item.description: 印度航空公司正成为中东以外受冲击最严重的航空公司，随着该地区冲突升级导致空域关闭，航班被迫大规模取消和改道。【原文：Indian carriers are emerging as the hardest hit outside the Middle East, as airspace closures across the region amid an escalating conflict force widespread cancellations and diversions.】

item.title: 彭博智库称，稀土新增供应量难以满足全球电动汽车和国防领域日益增长的需求
item.description: 据彭博智库报告称，本十年间涌现的新稀土供应量将不足以满足全球需求增长，这为供应短缺及主导供应商中国与少数亚洲以外生产商的定价能力增强铺平了道路。【原文：A wave of new rare-earth supply this decade won’t be enough to meet rising global demand, setting the stage for shortages and stronger pricing power for dominant supplier China and the handful of producers outside the Asian nation, according to a report from Bloomberg Intelligence.】

item.title: 土耳其经济增长在2025年末失去动力
item.description: 土耳其第四季度经济增速较前三季度放缓，因政策制定者维持紧缩政策以遏制两位数通胀。【原文：Turkey’s economic growth slowed in the fourth quarter compared to the previous three months, as policymakers maintained a tight stance to curb double-digit inflation.】

item.title: 欧洲天然气价格飙升25%，伊朗危机威胁全球供应
item.description: 中东地区战事升级引发对全球能源供应重大中断的担忧，欧洲天然气价格应声暴涨。【原文：European natural gas prices surged after fighting across the Middle East raised fears of a major disruption to global energy supplies.】

item.title: 全英房屋价格2月再度小幅上涨，Nationwide称
item.description: 英国房价再度上涨，该国一家顶级抵押贷款机构表示，房地产市场似乎正朝着2026年强劲复苏的方向发展。【原文：UK home prices rose again, according to one of the country’s top mortgage lenders, with the property market appearing to be on track for a strong 2026.】

item.title: 土耳其股市暴跌逾5%，伊朗危机搅动市场
item.description: 周一开盘，土耳其股市因中东冲突升级而大幅下跌。【原文：Turkish stocks slumped on Monday market open over an escalation in conflict in the Middle East.】

item.title: 伊朗空袭导致中东地区电商配送延误
item.description: 主要电商平台警告称，由于美国主导的对伊朗空袭行动扰乱了关键海空运输路线，向中东地区的配送时间将延长，这威胁到该行业增长最快的市场之一的商品供应。【原文：Major e-commerce platforms are warning of longer delivery times to the Middle East after the US-led bombing campaign against Iran disrupted key air and sea routes, threatening supplies to one of the industry’s fastest-growing markets.】

item.title: 等待霍尔木兹海峡开放，更多油轮聚集波斯湾
item.description: 数十艘满载的油轮正躲在波斯湾内，此前霍尔木兹海峡附近发生的袭击事件几乎封锁了这条水道，打乱了区域物流，减缓了出口，并威胁到近期生产。【原文：Dozens of laden oil tankers are hunkering down inside the Persian Gulf after attacks near the Strait of Hormuz have all but closed off the waterway, upending regional logistics, slowing exports and threatening near-term production.】

item.title: 刚果主要铜出口路线因桥梁坍塌中断
item.description: 洪水导致刚果民主共和国主要铜出口通道中断，该国南部靠近赞比亚边境处一座关键桥梁坍塌，阻断了全球第二大铜生产国的运输通道。【原文：Flooding severed the Democratic Republic of Congo’s main copper-export corridor after a key bridge collapsed just south of the Zambian border, disrupting shipments from the world’s second-largest producer of the metal.】

item.title: 英镑下跌，富时100指数料将下挫，投资者寻求避险资产
MTN全年盈利预计翻四倍，得益于尼日利亚和加纳市场增长
item.description: 非洲最大网络运营商MTN集团表示，在尼日利亚和加纳业务取得"强劲"业绩后，全年盈利预计将增长逾四倍。【原文：MTN Group Ltd., Africa’s biggest network operator, said full-year earnings are expected to more than quadruple after its Nigerian and Ghanaian operations delivered “robust” results.】

item.title: 新加坡称或重新评估GDP预期 因伊朗危机及油价波动
item.description: 新加坡副总理陈庆炎表示，由于中东危机可能推高全球能源价格，该国将视情况修订经济展望。【原文：Singapore Deputy Prime Minister Gan Kim Yong said the city-state will revise its economic outlook, if needed, due to the crisis in the Middle East which could push up global energy prices.】

item.title: 伊朗采取报复措施，海湾地区数百万移民工人面临风险
item.description: 数百万支撑着中东关键产业的移民工人，正因伊朗对美以联军袭击的报复行动而陷入火线。此前美以联军袭击行动已导致伊朗伊斯兰共和国最高领袖遇害。【原文：Millions of migrant workers, who support some of the Middle East’s most crucial sectors, are in the line of fire as Iran retaliates against the US-Israeli strikes that killed the Islamic Republic’s supreme leader.】

item.title: 主要保险俱乐部将终止波斯湾船舶战争险承保
item.description: 全球半数以上的最大海上保险俱乐部将从周四起停止为驶入波斯湾的船舶提供战争风险保险。【原文：More than half of the world’s largest maritime insurance clubs will cease cover for war risks for ships entering the Persian Gulf starting Thursday.】

item.title: 印度央行行长称利率将保持稳定，可能趋于下行
item.description: 印度央行行长在周一发表的《经济时报》专访中表示，该国政策利率将在较长时间内维持在当前水平附近，甚至可能呈现下行趋势。【原文：India’s policy rate will remain around current levels for an extended period and may even trend lower, the country’s central bank governor said in an interview with The Economic Times newspaper published Monday.】

item.title: 清洁巨头Clean Max在孟买上市首日股价暴跌，此前该公司完成3.41亿美元首次公开募股
item.description: 印度领先的可再生能源供应商之一——清洁马克斯环保能源解决方案有限公司的股票，周一在孟买首次交易中下跌，凸显出投资者对该行业的兴趣低迷。【原文：Shares of Clean Max Enviro Energy Solutions Ltd., one of India’s leading renewable energy providers, slipped in their Mumbai trading debut on Monday, underscoring muted investor appetite for the industry.】

item.title: 中国斥巨资打造非洲媒体帝国，却无人问津
item.description:
欧洲大陆的观众仍然强烈偏好本土媒体以及BBC、CNN等西方媒体机构。

【原文：

Viewers on the continent still strongly prefer local sources and Western outlets such as the BBC and CNN.

】

item.title: 英国税收激增，里夫斯收获220亿英镑意外之财
item.description: 财政大臣瑞秋·里夫斯在本周春季财政报告发布前意外获得220亿英镑（约合300亿美元）的财政盈余，这笔意外之财恰逢其时，正值她试图证明其稳定公共财政的努力正在见效之际。【原文：Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves has been given a £22 billion ($30 billion) windfall ahead of her spring update this week, an unexpected boost as she seeks to show her efforts to stabilize the public finances are working.】

item.title: 巴基斯坦证券交易所因股指创纪录暴跌暂停交易
item.description: 巴基斯坦关键股指创下有记录以来最大跌幅，此前美国和以色列对伊朗发动袭击后，中东地缘政治紧张局势升级。【原文：A key stock gauge in Pakistan plunged the most on record after geopolitical tensions in the Middle East escalated following US and Israel’s strikes on Iran.】

item.title: 印度炼油商再度瞄准俄罗斯原油，伊朗危机冲击供应链
item.description: 印度国有炼油商与政府官员上周末召开会议，商讨应对伊朗危机的应急方案。该危机已几乎切断了霍尔木兹海峡的石油运输——这条狭窄水道对印度约半数石油进口至关重要。【原文：Indian state refiners and government officials met over the weekend to hammer out contingency plans for a crisis in Iran that has all but stopped flows through the Strait of Hormuz, a narrow waterway vital for roughly half of the nation’s oil imports.】

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡航运延误推高油价，燃油价格随之上涨
item.description: 周一燃料价格飙升——柴油涨幅超过原油——因中东战事扩大，可能导致波斯湾炼油厂出口中断。【原文：Fuel prices jumped on Monday — with diesel surging more than crude oil — as the widening war in the Middle East threatened to disrupt exports from Persian Gulf refineries.】

item.title: 亚马逊云服务因"物体"撞击阿联酋数据中心而中断
item.description: 亚马逊网络服务公司（Amazon Web Services Inc.）因不明物体撞击其位于阿拉伯联合酋长国的一处数据中心引发火灾，导致服务中断。【原文：Amazon Web Services Inc. suffered a disruption to its services after unidentified objects struck one of its data centers in the United Arab Emirates, causing a fire.】

item.title: 吉利扩大对比亚迪的领先优势，创2022年以来最大销量差距
item.description: 中国汽车制造商吉利汽车控股有限公司连续第二个月销量超越比亚迪股份有限公司，给后者带来压力，迫使其加强产品阵容，重燃电动汽车需求疲软的局面。【原文：Chinese automaker Geely Automobile Holdings Ltd. sold more vehicles than BYD Co. for a second consecutive month, piling pressure on the latter to beef up its lineup and reignite waning demand for electric vehicles.】

item.title: 油价不会等待政权更迭的明朗化
item.description:
战争持续时间越长，发生全面崩溃的风险就越大。 

【原文：

The longer a shooting war continues, the greater the risk of an outright shock. 

】

item.title: 印度股市因中东冲突抹去美印贸易协议带来的涨幅
item.description: 印度股市周一大幅下挫，跟随亚洲多数市场下跌，因中东局势升级打击了投资者信心。【原文：Indian equities tumbled on Monday, tracking declines across most Asian peers, as escalating conflict in the Middle East dented investor sentiment.】

item.title: 中国科技股指数暴跌25%后闪现看跌信号
item.description: 恒生科技指数已跌破关键支撑线，鉴于地缘政治紧张局势和持续的盈利担忧，这预示着未来可能出现更多抛售。【原文：The Hang Seng Tech Index has slipped beneath a crucial support line that suggests more selloffs ahead given geopolitical tensions and lingering earnings worries.】
